backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor for Manish Infratech billing app; defines types for bills, line items, and party profiles, and exposes CRUD and query methods (addBill, editBill, deleteBill, getAllBills, searchBills, party summaries, company reports, P&L) with role-based access control.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module for the backend actor; defines old and new actor state types and a no-op `run` function that passes state through unchanged on canister reload.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs and titles (print CSS rules, actor initialization fixes, etc.) to their relevant source files, component dependencies, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short human-readable summaries describing each file's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the design system's light and dark color themes, including primary, secondary, muted, destructive, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app with a root div and a module script entry point targeting `src/main.tsx`, titled 'Manish Infratech'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration that defines all application routes (home, search, summary, party-summary, company-report, invoice print) under a root layout wrapped in AuthGuard and Layout.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Empty file with no content; intended to hold the access denied screen component.
frontend/src/components/AddBillForm.tsx: Bill entry form component with dynamic line items, GST auto-calculation (18% split into CGST/SGST), autocomplete for party/product names, and submit logic that converts dates to nanosecond timestamps before calling the backend addBill mutation.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component that reads session state from localStorage via `getIsAuthenticated` and renders either a SimpleLoginScreen or the protected children based on auth status.
frontend/src/components/AutocompleteInpu: A controlled input component that shows a filtered dropdown of suggestions as the user types, supporting click-outside dismissal and programmatic value selection.
frontend/src/components/BillResultsTable: Renders a paginated table of Bill records with formatted INR amounts and dates, and provides edit, delete, and print actions per row.
frontend/src/components/EditBillModal.ts: A modal form for editing an existing bill's party name, date, paid amount, and line items, with live GST/total calculations and submission via the editBill mutation.
frontend/src/components/InvoicePrintView: A print-optimized React component that renders a formatted GST invoice with company branding, party details, line-item table, tax breakdown, and amount-in-words.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The top-level app shell providing a sticky navigation header with links to all main routes, a logout button, and a footer, wrapping child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/components/SimpleLoginScree: A styled login form that authenticates users via the useSimpleAuth hook, displaying branding for Manish Infratech and showing an error message on failed login.
frontend/src/components/SummaryCard.tsx: Renders a responsive grid of four summary cards displaying Total Revenue, Total GST, CGST, and SGST amounts formatted in INR with icons.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including CRUD mutations and queries for bills, party names, GST data, and reports.
frontend/src/hooks/useSimpleAuth.ts: Implements a simple username/password authentication mechanism using localStorage with hardcoded credentials for basic app access control.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind with CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and defines print styles to show only invoice content.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AddBillPage.tsx: Page component for adding a new bill that shows connection status (loading, error, or connected) and renders the AddBillForm when the actor is available.
frontend/src/pages/CompanyReportPage.tsx: Page component that displays a filterable company report by party and date range, with a bills table and CSV export functionality.
frontend/src/pages/InvoicePrintPage.tsx: Page component that fetches a bill by ID and renders it in a print-friendly layout with Back and Print/Save PDF action buttons.
frontend/src/pages/PartySummaryPage.tsx: Page that displays a date-range-filtered summary of billing totals per party, with inline GST number editing and navigation to party details.
frontend/src/pages/SearchBillsPage.tsx: Page that loads all bills and provides a live text search filter by party name or invoice number, displaying results in a table.
frontend/src/pages/SummaryPage.tsx: Financial summary page showing date-range-filtered revenue, GST totals, and a bill table with CSV export functionality.
frontend/src/utils/dateConversion.ts: Utility functions for converting between nanosecond bigint timestamps, milliseconds, date input strings (YYYY-MM-DD), and formatted DD/MM/YYYY display strings.
frontend/src/utils/formatCurrency.ts: Exports two helpers that format numbers as Indian Rupee currency strings or plain locale-formatted numbers using the en-IN locale.
frontend/src/utils/numberToWords.ts: Converts a numeric amount to Indian currency words (e.g., 12500.50 → 'Rupees Twelve Thousand Five Hundred and Fifty Paise Only') using crore/lakh/thousand groupings.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Poppins), CSS variable-based color tokens, brand colors (red/navy), custom shadows, border radii, and enabling the animate and typography plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document (version 37) describing the Manish Infratech billing/invoice web app's features, architecture, known bugs, and implementation history, serving as a reference for build planning and issue tracking.
